name: change_qor_suggestion_property
short_description: Set FAILED_TO_APPLY property to 1, and APPLIED property to 0, for specified RQS suggestion ID
full_help:
change_qor_suggestion_property

Description: 
Set FAILED_TO_APPLY property to 1, and APPLIED property to 0, for specified RQS suggestion ID

Syntax: 
change_qor_suggestion_property  [-set_applied] [-set_failed_to_apply]
                                [-set_incr_friendly] [-reset_incr_friendly]
                                [-set_properties <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                                <IDs>

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-set_applied]          set APPLIED = 1
  [-set_failed_to_apply]  set APPLIED = 0, FAILED_TO_APPLY = 1
  [-set_incr_friendly]    set INCR_FRIENDLY = 1
  [-reset_incr_friendly]  set INCR_FRIENDLY = 0
  [-set_properties]       set_property COMMAND <...>
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution
  <IDs>                   Match suggestion names against given names

Categories: 
Object, Feasibility, Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
